hero_stat1: Years of empirical rigor in full-stack design
bridge1_onboarding_image_alt: Juan Diego Saire, JDigital founder, presenting his definitive standard of digital production
bridge1_onboarding_heading: JDigital is not an agency. It is my signature, the apex of my work standard.
work_card1_body: Lima Airport's new terminal needed to capture non-aeronautical revenue. I designed and built LimaFly App's full UX/UI architecture, covering the critical path for 40M+ passengers a year.
work_card2_body: Lima Airport needed real adoption of the Agile standard. I designed and led immersion training for 70 change agents, turning theory into immediate execution protocols across their divisions.
work_card3_body: Designing an aeronautical fee with no global precedent meant operating without a manual. I ran the TUUA Transfer post-mortem and codified the findings into a new operating standard for Lima Airport.
work_card4_body: This site isn't a traditional portfolio; it's my product zero. I develop this platform on Microsoft's latest front-end ecosystem, empirically validating every technical decision before I scale it.
ticker_lede: Ten years of execution across industry and academia.
ticker_logo_utec_alt: UTEC University of Engineering and Technology
bridge2_positioning_heading: Innovation dies between the roadmap and the code. I close that gap by shipping, not talking.
bridge2_positioning_image_alt: Juan Diego Saire, JDigital founder, dominating the digital product cycle between strategy and build
services_s1_title: Bridging the gap from deck to shipped product
services_s1_body: Great teams need decisive architecture, not more consultants. Integrate the single strategist who owns the gap between behavioral design and production code. Secure the exclusive executive asset that aligns your digital product roadmap and brings undeniable order to chaos.
services_s2_body: Standard training is a commodity; your organization requires a behavioral shift. Whether for corporate upskilling, startup accelerators, or university-level curricula, install the battle-tested frameworks that force actual execution. Equip your talent to build digital products that survive the real world.
services_s3_body: The circuit is flooded with influencers who cannot build. In the climax of 2026's AI releases, your stage requires practitioner-grade truth. Anchor your event with the apex digital architect and deliver the cold, unfiltered reality of live digital product builds.
services_s4_title: Engineering video capsules for the feed
services_s4_body: Generic guests kill retention. Secure the on-camera authority your platform actually needs. Handle the logistics — receive the apex-level scripts, deep product strategy, and a calculated delivery designed to dominate the feed and dictate the terms.

capabilities_node_pd_desc: Hypotheses cost time and capital. I build every interface on real user-behavior data, validating the critical path before committing resources.
capabilities_node_fd_desc: Innovation that isn't coded doesn't exist. I take control of technical deployment, writing efficient front-end architectures accelerated by AI workflows.
capabilities_node_ux_desc: Design suffers in handoffs. I act as the single control node between the visual design system and front-end deployment, guaranteeing absolute fidelity.
capabilities_node_cx_desc: Friction destroys commercial value. I audit the entire user journey and execute tactical interventions to eradicate operational bottlenecks.
capabilities_node_tt_desc: Technical implementation is only half the work. I run the corporate training that ensures human capital operates under the new standard.
capabilities_node_gh_desc: Traffic is useless if the platform doesn't retain. I don't speculate on growth. I measure exactly where users drop off and launch rapid experiments to force conversion.
capabilities_node_pm_desc: Programs collapse on hidden dependencies. I take command of complex portfolios, centralizing governance to eradicate cross-project friction and secure transversal delivery.
capabilities_node_sm_desc: Agility without discipline is chaos. I facilitate relentless development cycles geared to value delivery, shielding engineers from external noise.
capabilities_node_prd_desc: A wishlist is not a product. I dictate backlog priority based on demonstrable commercial return, blocking any feature that doesn't move that lever.

bridge3_filter_heading: The arsenal is decisive, but restricted. Every deal is governed by the Triple Zero standard.
bridge3_filter_image_alt: Juan Diego Saire, JDigital founder, establishing the strict filters for his digital projects
about_lede: The absolute baseline required to secure a collaboration.
about_card1_body: Every move is calculated. JDigital locks in the exact parameters of success before the work starts. Relying on disciplined methodologies ensures progress is undeniable and results are immune to subjective debate.
about_card2_body: Execution requires undeniable leadership. JDigital partners exclusively with proven sponsors who prioritize momentum over corporate noise. Securing this alignment ensures the arsenal is fully unlocked to drive real impact.
about_card3_body: High-fidelity engineering rejects speculation. JDigital embeds Claude Pro and Gemini Pro into its development cycles. Deploying this arsenal imposes iron predictability and protects you from inflated promises.
contact_opt1: Embedded engagement — strategy, build, and adoption
contact_opt4: Video — shorts, long form, or live
contact_msg_placeholder: Describe the scope, the expected role, and the timeline. The precision of these details will determine whether the engagement is viable.
contact_success_body: The engagement's viability will be assessed, and you'll receive a response within 48 business hours.
contact_brief_success_body: Brief access will be processed, and you'll be notified within 48 business hours.
